# YOUR CODE HERE
import sys
import threading

def main():
    import sys
    input = sys.stdin.read
    data = input().split()
    
    N = int(data[0])
    A = list(map(int, data[1:N+1]))
    W = list(map(int, data[N+1:2*N+1]))
    
    # Create a mapping from box to list of items in it
    box_to_items = {}
    for i in range(N):
        box = A[i]
        if box not in box_to_items:
            box_to_items[box] = []
        box_to_items[box].append(i)
    
    # For each box, if there is more than one item, we need to move all but one
    # We will keep the item with the largest weight in the box (to minimize cost)
    # The rest will be moved
    total_cost = 0
    
    for box in box_to_items:
        items = box_to_items[box]
        if len(items) == 1:
            continue
        # Keep the item with the maximum weight
        max_weight = max(W[i] for i in items)
        # Add the cost of moving all other items
        for i in items:
            if W[i] != max_weight:
                total_cost += W[i]
    
    print(total_cost)

threading.Thread(target=main).start()
